titles.en: al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn
al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn

segments: من يروي عنه. وكان أبوه القاسم من وجوه الشيعة، ولكن لم يرو شيئا.
arabic.text: من يروي عنه. وكان أبوه القاسم من وجوه الشيعة، ولكن لم يرو شيئا.

segments: 2 – al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn.  They have weakened him, but according to me he is thiqa.  However there is discussion in regards to those who narrate from him.  And his father, al-Qāsim, was from the noteworthy of the Shīʿa, however nothing has been narrated from him.
en.tashayyu.text: 2 – al-Ḥusayn b. al-Qāsim b. Muḥammad b. Ayyūb b. Shammūn.  They have weakened him, but according to me he is thiqa.  However there is discussion in regards to those who narrate from him.  And his father, al-Qāsim, was from the noteworthy of the Shīʿa, however nothing has been narrated from him.

narratorChain.raw: 2 - الحسين بن القاسم بن محمد بن أيوب بن شمون. ضعفوه. وهو عندي ثقة. ولكن بحث في
